items.final_wording: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of suspected infection, cellulitis, microbiology context, structured wound care, and local heat, redness, pain, swelling, discharge, separation, abscess, fever, or systemic signs.

items.rationale: The exact postoperative-wound section supports documenting excision-wound interval history, change, pain or symptoms, clinician skin inspection, infection signs, general appearance and available pathology or microbiology results without diagnosing infection or dehiscence.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician-documented postoperative wound-care information, infection-warning discussion, and who to contact if concern develops.

source.title: Surgical site infections: prevention and treatment — Recommendations
source.population: Adults, young people, and children having a surgical procedure involving a skin incision.
source.setting: Perioperative, postoperative, community, and specialist wound-care services.
source.exclusions: Exact for postoperative wound-care and surgical-site-infection documentation; partial for traumatic wounds, suture removal, and UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.1.4 — information, wound care, and infection recognition

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-documented postoperative wound-care information, infection-warning discussion, and who to contact if concern develops.

items.rationale: The exact postoperative information section supports recording only a clinician-entered plan, safety net, arranged follow-up and patient questions.
